title: Digital Chamber amicus brief urges dismissal of NY lawsuit over 39,069 Bitcoin wallets
summary: The Digital Chamber filed an amicus brief urging the dismissal of the New York lawsuit seeking ownership of 39,069 dormant Bitcoin wallets, arguing it would set a dangerous precedent for self-custodial wallets.

title: MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins grew 128% before MiCA transition ended, says Decta
summary: Decta's report said the market cap of eight MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins rose to $673.9 million in the year before Europe’s CASP transition period ended.

title: Wall Street Buys Into Musk’s SpaceX Vision
summary: SpaceX is joining the Nasdaq 100 Index and analysts at big global brokers are recommending investors buy shares.

title: A Once-Great Copper Miner Faces a Reckoning Just as AI Power Demand Soars
summary: Chile’s Codelco, facing scrutiny for a fatal accident and inflated production figures, is struggling under $25 billion of debt.

title: Trump-Backed American Bitcoin (ABTC) Pushes Treasury Past 8,000 BTC
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Trump-Backed American Bitcoin (ABTC) Pushes Treasury Past 8,000 BTC
American Bitcoin (Nasdaq: ABTC) said its treasury has surpassed 8,000 BTC.

title: USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
After years of development, UTEXO—backed by Tether—rolls out Bitcoin-native USDT with client-side validation, slashing fees and middlemen compared to Tron or Ethereum rails.

title: ByteDance and Alibaba to Pull Agent Features as China Cracks Down on Humanlike AI
summary: Beijing's first rules targeting emotional AI are forcing the country's biggest apps to shut down custom agents.

title: UK Foreign Secretary Warns of 'AI Hiroshima' if Policymakers Don’t Act
summary: Yvette Cooper said governments must agree on AI safeguards before frontier systems transform warfare, crime, and society.

title: Galaxy delivers 133 MW of critical IT load to CoreWeave as Helios bitcoin mine turns AI hub
summary: Galaxy delivered 133 MW of critical IT load to CoreWeave at its Helios campus, completing Phase I of the West Texas site's AI conversion.

title: Tether’s former CIO seeks buyers for part of his stake in the firm: Bloomberg
summary: Former Tether CIO Richard Heathcote is seeking buyers for part of his 1.26% stake in the firm, according to Bloomberg.

title: Greek shipping companies made almost $4bn carrying Russian oil in past three years
summary: Dynacom Tankers, Stealth Maritime and Onassis Group boost revenues from transporting Russian fuel under G7 price cap regime

title: ‘Battle in the sky’ will decide outcome of war with Russia, says Zelenskyy
summary: Ukrainian president says Trump has changed his mind about the conflict
